scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/server" "npm run dev -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/server && npm run test -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/server && npm run build -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/server && npm run typecheck -w @ai-vision-voice-chat/web
